name: Potential Gazer Activity
notes: This rule detects Turla Gazer activity which is a backdoor that uses various techniques for persistence.
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:BehaviorDefinition: Startup Shortcut Created, BB:BehaviorDefinition: Gazer Registry, BB:BehaviorDefinition: Gazer Registry Values, BB:BehaviorDefinition: Gazer Filenames
TD_list: APPLY Potential Gazer Activity on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when an event matches any of the following BB:BehaviorDefinition: Startup Shortcut Created, BB:BehaviorDefinition: Gazer Registry, BB:BehaviorDefinition: Gazer Registry Values, BB:BehaviorDefinition: Gazer Filenames
RED_list: Event description: Detects Turla Gazer activity which is a backdoor that uses various techniques for persistence.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Machine Identifier (custom)
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
